Essential Lockers

Cabinet-Grade Pre-Finished Birch Plywood for Wood Lockers

Cabinet-Grade Pre-Finished Birch Plywood | 19mm | UV-Coated Both Sides | 5 Year Warranty
Cabinet-Grade Pre-Finished Birch Plywood
Cabinet-Grade Pre-Finished Birch Plywood for Wood Lockers

Our lockers are built using 19mm pre-finished birch plywood, a high-quality panel material known for its smooth face, stable veneer core, and attractive natural wood look. With a durable UV-coated finish on both sides, this plywood is ideal for creating strong, professional-grade wood lockers that perform well in demanding locker room settings.
